title: The Rate-Limiting Step
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing6: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing5: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to B+S. Ears react to R+L. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have B− AND R+. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [6, 7]. Alch: ing6→Ppn, ing7→pNn.
